notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Kyle Tucker. Trea Turner to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Alex Call out at 2nd. Alex Freeland out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas pops out to second baseman Bryson Stott.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner reached on error
